sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113451" key="xartopra/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρτο-πράτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n113451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dealer in papyrus,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.18</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
